title: Creating Context and Provider
description: Create a context and wrap components with a Provider.

slides.title: Context = Global (ish) Data 🌐
slides.content:
# Context API Overview

Context provides a way to pass data through the component tree without having to pass props down manually at every level.

## Two Main Parts

1. **`React.createContext`** – creates a Context object.
2. **`Context.Provider`** – a component that provides the value to all descendants.

## Creating a Context

```jsx
const UserContext = React.createContext();
```

You can also pass a default value (used when a component is not wrapped in a Provider):

```jsx
const UserContext = React.createContext({ name: 'Guest' });
```

slides.title: Using the Provider
slides.content: Wrap the part of the tree that needs access to the context:

quizData.question: The Provider component must wrap all components that need access to the context.
quizData.explanation: Yes, the Provider makes the context value available to its descendants.
